name: Jane Fonda
abstract: Jane Seymour Fonda (born December 21, 1937) is an American actress and activist. Fonda's work spans several genres and over seven decades of film and television.

concerts.label: The Collegiate Chorale
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Chris Parker
about_quotes.evidence: one of the first movies I did was with Paul Butterfield and Nick Gravenites and Mike Bloomfield called “Steelyard Blues” with Jane Fonda and Donald Sutherland

about_quotes.speaker: Patricia Willard
about_quotes.evidence: You remember the movie, They Shoot Horses, with Jane Fonda and Gig Young, Michael Sarazin...
